title: Orbit Apple App Manifest v1
description: Authoring schema for app-centric Orbit Apple manifests.

$schema.description: Schema identifier used by Orbit backend dispatch and editor validation. This can be a version-pinned published URL from `https://orbitstorage.dev/schemas/` or a local path ending with `apple-app.v1.json`.

_description.description: Optional informational note for humans and agents. Orbit ignores this field at runtime. `orbit init` uses it to point readers at `orbit --help` and `orbit ui init --help`.

name.description: Canonical product name. This also becomes the synthesized root target name.

bundle_id.description: Root bundle identifier for the app family.

build.description: Monotonic integer build number mapped to `CFBundleVersion`.

xcode.description: Optional Xcode version to use for Orbit's Xcode-backed commands, for example `26.4`. Orbit resolves the installed Xcode bundle, uses its developer directory, and can fetch the matching official simulator runtime when needed.

pushBroadcastForLiveActivities.description: Request Broadcast Push Notifications for Live Activities.

extensions.description: Embedded extensions keyed by stable extension id.

watch.description: Companion watchOS app and watch extension.

quality.description: Lint and format configuration owned by Orbit.

asc.description: Embedded ASC configuration used by `orbit asc ...` and Orbit-managed signing flows.

$schema.description: Optional embedded schema reference for the ASC section.

rules.description: SwiftLint rule configuration. Orbit accepts ESLint-style levels (`off`, `warn`, `error`) plus raw SwiftLint rule options.
swift-format configuration overlay. PascalCase keys target formatter rule ids; lowerCamelCase keys target raw swift-format configuration fields.

editorconfig.description: When true, Orbit applies supported `.editorconfig` formatting keys (`indent_style`, `indent_size`, `tab_width`, `max_line_length`) before `quality.format.rules`.

universal_binary.description: When true, Orbit builds macOS app binaries for both arm64 and x86_64 and merges them into a Universal 2 executable.

dependencySpec.description: Exactly one dependency source must be selected.

embed.description: Optional override for automatic embed detection.

git.description: Git URL for a Swift package repository.
Git URL for a Swift package repository.

version.description: Exact semver release label resolved from a remote tag.

framework.description: Links a system Apple framework by dependency key.

embed.description: Optional override for automatic embed detection.
Optional override for automatic embed detection.

plistValue.description: JSON value that Orbit can represent in an Apple plist.

extra.description: Raw `Info.plist` keys. Common `NS*UsageDescription` keys are documented explicitly below, and any other plist-compatible keys can still be added.

NSCameraUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests camera access.

NSMicrophoneUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests microphone access.

NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app reads from the photo library.

NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app writes to the photo library.

NSContactsUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests contacts access.

NSCalendarsUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests calendar access.

NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests full read and write calendar access.

NSCalendarsWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests write-only calendar access.

NSRemindersFullAccessUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests full reminders access.

NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests location access while in use.

NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests always-on location access.

NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription.description: Legacy privacy reason for always-on location access.

NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests Bluetooth access.

NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription.description: Legacy privacy reason shown when the app uses Core Bluetooth peripheral access.

NSRemindersUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests reminders access.

NSHomeKitUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests HomeKit access.

NSMotionUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests motion and fitness data.

NSFaceIDUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app uses Face ID authentication.

NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app accesses devices on the local network.

NSBonjourServices.description: Bonjour service types the app browses or advertises on the local network.

NSLocationTemporaryUsageDescriptionDicti.description: Temporary precise location purpose strings keyed by the app-defined purpose identifier.

NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests speech recognition access.

NSSiriUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests Siri or Intents access.

NSNearbyInteractionUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests Nearby Interaction access.

NSHealthShareUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app reads HealthKit data.

NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app writes HealthKit data.

NSAppleMusicUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app accesses the user's media library.

NSAppleScriptEnabled.description: Whether AppleScript support is enabled for the macOS app.

NSAppleEventsUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown on macOS when the app sends Apple events to control other apps.

NSDockTilePlugIn.description: Bundle-relative name of the app's Dock tile plug-in.

NSHealthClinicalHealthRecordsShareUsageD.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests access to the user's clinical health records.

NSHealthRequiredReadAuthorizationTypeIde.description: Required HealthKit type identifiers that must all be authorized for read access.

NSHealthRequiredWriteAuthorizationTypeId.description: Required HealthKit type identifiers that must all be authorized for write access.

NSUserTrackingUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app requests tracking authorization.

NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription.description: Optional notification permission prompt text on newer Apple platforms.

NSAppTransportSecurity.description: App Transport Security policy overrides and exception domains.

NSHumanReadableCopyright.description: Localized copyright string shown by the system.

NSJavaNeeded.description: Whether the macOS app requires a running Java VM.

NSJavaPath.description: Java class search paths whose components are preceded by `NSJavaRoot`.

NSJavaRoot.description: Root directory containing Java classes referenced by `NSJavaPath`.

NSLocationUsageDescription.description: Legacy location usage description. Apple recommends `NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription` or `NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription` instead.

NSMainNibFile.description: Main nib file base name for AppKit-style apps.

NSPersistentStoreTypeKey.description: Core Data persistent store type associated with a document type.

NSPrefPaneIconFile.description: Image resource used to represent a preference pane in System Settings.

NSPrefPaneIconLabel.description: Label displayed beneath a preference pane icon in System Settings.

NSPrincipalClass.description: Principal Objective-C class for the bundle.

NSServices.description: Service definitions provided by the macOS app.

NSSupportsAutomaticTermination.description: Whether the macOS app supports automatic termination.

NSSupportsPurgeableLocalStorage.description: Whether the app can rely on nonlocal storage for user data.

NSSupportsSuddenTermination.description: Whether the macOS app supports sudden termination.

NSUbiquitousContainers.description: iCloud Drive container settings keyed by container identifier.

NSUbiquitousDisplaySet.description: Display set identifier used for the app's mobile document storage.

NSUserActivityTypes.description: User activity types supported by the app.

NSUserNotificationAlertStyle.description: macOS notification style for the app.

NSSystemAdministrationUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown on macOS when the app requests privileged system administration access.

NSVideoSubscriberAccountUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app accesses the user's TV provider account.

NSDesktopFolderUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app accesses the desktop folder on macOS.

NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app accesses the documents folder on macOS.

NSDownloadsFolderUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app accesses the downloads folder on macOS.

NSNetworkVolumesUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app accesses network-mounted volumes on macOS.

NSRemovableVolumesUsageDescription.description: Privacy reason shown when the app accesses removable volumes on macOS.

^NS[A-Z].*$.description: Apple `NS*` plist key, typically used for privacy usage descriptions or other system metadata.

app_groups.description: Application groups. Values should use the `group.` prefix.

merchant_ids.description: Apple Pay merchant identifiers. Values should use the `merchant.` prefix.

cloud_containers.description: iCloud container identifiers. Values should use the `iCloud.` prefix.

icloud_services.description: Enabled iCloud services for the declared cloud containers.

network_extensions.description: Network Extension providers enabled for this target.

managed_app_distribution_install_ui.description: Managed app distribution install UI modes.

user_management.description: Enables Managed Apple ID user management.

media_device_discovery_extension.description: Enables media device discovery extension support.

on_demand_install_capable.description: Marks the target as on-demand install capable.

driverkit_family_hid_eventservice.description: Enables DriverKit HID event service family.

submerged_shallow_depth_and_pressure.description: Enables shallow depth and pressure access for submerged scenarios.

proximity_reader_payment_acceptance.description: Enables Tap to Pay on iPhone.

extra.description: Raw entitlement keys not modeled directly by Orbit. Keys generated from first-class fields cannot be overridden here.

nsServiceEntry.description: Single macOS service definition from the `NSServices` array.

NSMessage.description: Instance method name invoked for the service.

NSSendFileTypes.description: UTI file types accepted by the service.

NSSendTypes.description: Pasteboard types accepted by the service.

NSRequiredContext.description: Conditions that control whether the service is available.

NSRestricted.description: Whether sandboxed apps are prevented from invoking the service.

NSReturnTypes.description: Pasteboard types returned by the service.

nsUbiquitousContainerSettings.description: Settings for a single iCloud Drive container.

NSUbiquitousContainerIsDocumentScopePubl.description: Whether iCloud Drive should expose the container contents publicly.

NSUbiquitousContainerName.description: Display name used for the container in iCloud Drive.

NSUbiquitousContainerSupportedFolderLeve.description: Maximum nesting level allowed in the container's Documents directory.

storyboard.description: Main storyboard name for storyboard-backed extension entry points.

activation_rule.description: NSExtension activation rule, for example `TRUEPREDICATE` or a predicate dictionary.

javascript_preprocessing_file.description: Optional JavaScript preprocessing file name without the `.js` suffix.

network_url.description: Optional server endpoint used by the message filter extension.

initial_content_size_ratio.description: Initial size ratio used by notification content UI.

document_type_identifier.description: UTType identifier added to `CFBundleDocumentTypes` for the photo project extension.

kind.description: Closed Orbit extension kind DSL aligned with Xcode application extension templates.

unit.description: Root directories for Swift Testing source files.

ui.description: Root directories for Orbit UI flow JSON files.

lintRuleSetting.description: Rule setting. Orbit accepts `off`, `warn`, `error`, `[level, options]`, or raw SwiftLint rule configuration.

formatRuleSetting.description: Rule setting. Orbit accepts `off`, `warn`, `error`, `[level, options]`, or raw swift-format rule configuration.
